name: MiHCM
description: Digital Human Capital Management Solution Learn more about MiHCM

reviews.review_pros: Mobile apps UI, various features, user friendly
reviews.review_cons: minimal customization, need to enhance based on Indonesia Customization

reviews.review_title: A good one in the current market
reviews.review_description: All in one HR solution for any type of companies.
reviews.review_pros: I'm using this currently. There are features like leave management, attendance management, HR notice board, reach HR and my activity feed and things to do list. In leave management I can apply, cancel and view leave calendar and summary. I can view my company personal profile details and timeline. The best thing of the mobile app is that I can approve leave requests and it notify me without being missed any.
reviews.review_cons: I had some navigation problems in the mobile app. I was confused to from where to navigate as some of the tabs are not clickable / takes time to load the view.

reviews.review_description: Overall, I am not satisfied. I felt like everything took so much time to process and resolve. Come to our renewal, the rate was very high that I don't even understand how they come up with that rate.
reviews.review_pros: At first, I like MiHCM comparing it to the old system that we used, our sales manager is also easy to talk too. I also liked that MiHCM has a lot of potential when it comes to analytics. System generated reports are okay.
reviews.review_cons: As time passes by, the support team took so much time to resolve issues. Some issues gets resolves 2 weeks to 1 month and some are more than 1 month. Some part of the system and reports has jargons that we do not use in the Philippines. I hope those kind of jargons will be replaced with a common English word. The system has some bugs like some fixed transactions should be uploaded in the payroll module every payroll processing. You cannot have urgent support when needed, it took time for the supports to respond. Most of the time, I get to resolve all my issues on my own before they respond.

reviews.review_description: MiHCM application improved our company HR operations in terms of centralizing employee count and streamlined payroll, attendance, recruitments and trainings. Also with the automation we have saving more than 20000 papers per month, which impact to our sustainability strategy. It will give more improvements to HR operation in terms of using it as a main application for HR Department.
reviews.review_pros: This product is a simple and easy to use application form different angles. End users are highly rated and satisfy with the product and same time administrators also highly like to work on the product. Product will be highly configurable and supportive with the operational changes. Time and Attendance module will give massive uplift to the management as well as manage the legal activities.
reviews.review_cons: This application designed and improved for more into executive level company. It should be improve on the non-executive level features and functional operations. The limited flexibility available on aligning non-executive (staff level) requirements.

reviews.review_description: Its good, as i have mentioned earlier if all the minor issues are solved it can be a better one.
reviews.review_pros: With new unique software, it has a high opportunity to expand its market in Bangladesh.
reviews.review_cons: the software is still not a solid one, there are a lot of minor improvements but it creates a hassle for the end users. Like people using old versions, smartphones cannot access the software. and we cannot ask our employees to upgrade their cell phones. Mihcm should have provision and back of the older versions for maximum user interaction.

reviews.review_description: Cost effectiveness is our best choice that we use MiHCM. Overall are though real time customer service is to be improved, our Technical support team from VDBLoi Myanmar is very efficient in providing necessary assistances whenever we required. Country based technical support is one of competitive prospects that we chose MiHCM service.
reviews.review_pros: User friendly, cost effective, Updated Technology support. Payroll module is very supportive. Extracted reports are very reliable and valid.
reviews.review_cons: Customer Service from MiHCM should be more improved to provide quick response and support in real time basis. Necessary improvements should be required through integration with core SAP and other ERP platforms.

reviews.review_description: As daily basic, can handle routine workload liked attendance, leave, recruiting, offboarding, etc.
reviews.review_pros: Time and management records mostly accurately and also in mobile app. Payroll function and report can deploy adaptively per company policy.
reviews.review_cons: Learning management need more functions and usability align with practice in externally but not just record. Second is release note need to release / update on time while something change in functions/ form/ modules. Customizable mail template and announcement needed with more function by admin(customer)

reviews.author_profession: Deputy Director, Partnership and Regional Business
reviews.review_pros: Dynamic, user friendly and can retrieve multiple reporting format.
reviews.review_cons: Learning platform and training management module is the weakest feature among others of MiHCM.

reviews.review_description: flexible attendance, leave management. It's really helpful to our flexible company.
reviews.review_pros: I love the User Interface, so smooth and modern for HR system compared to another product.
reviews.review_cons: They really need upgrade the support team.

reviews.review_pros: The best feature was that we could have the whole software interface in another language which helped our employees use it.
reviews.review_cons: The software was unreliable. If we requested customization for one area, it would somehow go and impact another completely different area and cause an error there. The software was also very difficult to use for both the administrator and users.

reviews.review_pros: The product was easy to use and the integration was quite successful and the team was very helpful at the initial stages.
reviews.review_cons: The support team is very slow and difficult to reach when urgent requirements rise.

reviews.review_pros: User Interface is great. Easy to use. Mobile app is very convenient to use on the go.
reviews.review_cons: Synching problem with fingerprint device

reviews.review_description: Its a organized software and manageable by nature of tasks.
reviews.review_pros: Anniversary mail and on boarding-exit way
reviews.review_cons: Payroll process bit complex but manageable

reviews.review_title: Provides a suitable platform for future human resources management without paper.
reviews.review_description: Easy access and storage of accurate data and analytical information.
reviews.review_pros: it produced comprehensive reports for a company decision making and leave management systems are more effective and it helps to staff find it easier to apply for and track their leave, and helps to managers to handle the situations.
reviews.review_cons: Data entering will take too much time and will not have immediate responses to solve software issues quickly.

reviews.review_title: MiHCM is not up to the level
reviews.review_pros: Nothing. Earlier we had an HCM module. Last year we upgraded to MIHCM and try to get payroll also.But it failed.
reviews.review_cons: Customer service is very bad. No one answers the calls. It takes a long time to solve problems after many reminders.

reviews.review_title: Digital Ease-of-use HR system for this modern day digital environment
reviews.review_description: Microimage is very committed to bring more enhancements and new features to the system and their support is commended.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use dash-board widgets, strong workflow management, very easy to use mobile app for employees and management for requesting for services and approvals process.
reviews.review_cons: It would have been better if it records more swaps of employees check in check outs.

reviews.review_pros: ESS Feature for mange attendance & personal details
reviews.review_cons: Multiple users can't use the process function in same time.

reviews.review_description: There is a long way to go and the system after the implementation is not stable.
reviews.review_pros: Mobile Application and you can use anywhere
reviews.review_cons: Inflexibility in customization and the type of reports are not user friendly

reviews.review_pros: The Mobile Application, Data Analytic, Dashboard, Chatbot and Advance Query tool make the HRM become easy, informative and real time. The GUI is clean and simple.
reviews.review_cons: The features and the functionalities of the software need to improve to capture the tier 1 market.

reviews.review_title: The soft ware itself mixed with lot more configuration and user friendly .
reviews.review_pros: Liked technical opportunities and scope. Foreigners are so caring. need more customer focused and results oriented .
reviews.review_cons: technical expertise and software issue . And foreigners involvement

reviews.review_title: Corporate need this software to manage your organization.
reviews.review_description: Need HR team to understand the feature of the software
reviews.review_pros: Nice and Clean user interface. Great dashboard info. Ease of use.
reviews.review_cons: Need to request more reports to fulfill our need.

reviews.review_pros: It runs on the cloud so it is cost effective, easy to manage,has mobile apps, and the MiHcm team is very responsive
reviews.review_cons: Could use better graphics, apps should have better graphical interface.And the pass word has to be entered several times within few month

reviews.review_title: User Friendly HCM with Easy Transition and Implementation
reviews.review_description: It’s user friendly and transitioning to it is also easy. The team that implemented it has a clear cut schedule and they really take the time to understand requirements of the company.
reviews.review_pros: It’s easily accessible from both web and mobile
reviews.review_cons: None. So far, I have not seem any issues with miHCM

reviews.review_title: A comprehensive digital transformation of human capital management
reviews.review_description: This solution challenges the user to look at approaches to look at big data with the framework of human capital management.
reviews.review_pros: Has provided the road map to introduce predictive analytics from the mainstream Descriptive Analytics
reviews.review_cons: Not enough information about the product in the market

reviews.review_title: HR systems usually a pain to use, but not this. Everyone finds it a delight to use.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Coordinating and communication between employees and the organization has improved significantly. Most of our work is done by employees' working remotely. This application helps them feel connected with the rest of the organization.
reviews.review_pros: Contextual navigation, "breeze of use", web & mobile accessibility, continuous innovation, natural language query capability, well thought out analytics & dashboards.
reviews.review_cons: It's slick UX/UI makes all the other corporate software seem dated, and old. Awaiting the enabling the employee questionnaires for confirming understanding of training required for compliance.
